# FSL Cricket Scoreboard Controller
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/pull/3443
# https://github.com/InTheAbsenceOfAHorse/rtl_433_tests/tree/master/tests/FSL%20Cricket%20Scoreboard%20Controlller
#
# Synthesized (not captured) codes: full 38-bit preamble + 10x 72-bit block
# (3-bit sync + Manchester-encoded 32-bit payload + 5 pad bits), covering all
# four field IDs seen in the real captures (3, 5, 8, 14) at every value that
# appeared in that repo's recording sessions (stepping by 10 up to 50, per
# its commit history). Each code independently verified against the decoder.

{758}aaaaaaaaabd2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55503d2ab532ad4aad55500
{758}aaaaaaaaabd2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55503d2ab532ad4d4d55500
{758}aaaaaaaaabd2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555503d2ab532ad4d3555500
